title: iris savannarum var. kimballiae
intro: Iris savannarum var. kimballiae is a variant of the yellow flag iris plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iris savannarum var. kimballiae include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
